scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix telegram-parser
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:all
scripts.start: npx concurrently "PORT=3001 npm start --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix telegram-parser"
